topic.title: Today's Guest Speaker: Venkat Patla
topic.text:
Today's Guest Speaker: Venkat Patla

Venkat Patla is Chief Marketing Officer and Head of Brand at RWA Wealth Partners. He's built iconic brands at Leo Burnett, Edelman Financial Engines (the country's largest independent wealth advisor with $300 billion under management), UBS Wealth Management, and Publicis—working with many clients from Avis to BNY Mellon to the London Stock Exchange.

Check out his LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vpatla/

Please have your camera on and come prepared with questions for participation credit. Venkat's career spans agency and client-side work across every channel—this is your chance to learn from someone who's done the full-stack creative thing at the highest level.

Thanks Prof. Nik & Nina
